data.title: Victoria’s Secret & Co. Reports 2025 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
data.description: Reynoldsburg, OH - On March 5, 2026, Victoria's Secret & Co. (VSCO) shared their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluded on January 31, 2026. The Company is traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol VSCO.

data.title: Tango Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Highlights
data.description: In 2026, preliminary results from the Phase 1/2 trial of vopimetostat combined with Revolution Medicines' RAS(ON) inhibitors in MTAP-deleted pancreatic cancer showed promising outcomes. The trial continues to attract a significant number of patients, indicating strong participation and interest in this novel treatment approach.
Altimmune reveals financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, along with business updates.

data.title: Invivyd Appoints Distinguished Physician and Scientist, Michael Mina, M.D., Ph.D. as Chief Medical Officer
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in New Haven, Connecticut, Invivyd, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVVD) revealed the selection of Dr. Michael Mina, M.D., Ph.D., as their Chief Medical Officer.

data.title: GH Research Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: Dublin-based GH Research PLC (Nasdaq: GHRS) announced their financial results for the year ending on December 31, 2025. The company, focused on developing innovative treatments for depression, disclosed their annual report today. GH Research PLC is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company aiming to revolutionize patient care.

data.title: Erasca and Tango Therapeutics Enter into Clinical Collaboration to Evaluate Combination of ERAS-0015 and Vopimetostat
data.description: A molecular glue known as ERAS-0015, which targets pan-RAS, is set to undergo assessment in combination with the PRMT5 inhibitor vopimetostat. This evaluation aims to explore the potential synergistic effects of the two compounds in combating RAS-related pathways. This research holds promise for developing novel therapeutic strategies for diseases associated with RAS dysregulation.
MediWound's financial results for Q4 and full year 2025 are now available.

data.title: Immatics Announces Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Business Update
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Immatics N.V. (NASDAQ: IMTX), headquartered in Houston, Texas and Tuebingen, Germany, a leading clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in precise targeting of PRAME, announced a business update and disclosed its financial performance for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: HAYLOU Introduces Flowbuds N55: Reliable Everyday Performance, Made Accessible
data.description: Hong Kong-based company HAYLOU has recently launched the True Wireless Flowbuds N55, aimed at providing users with a dependable option for their everyday listening needs.

data.title: OneSpaWorld Appoints Ilana Craig Alberico as Vice President of Business Development & Strategy – Resort Spa Operations
data.description: In the Bahamas, OneSpaWorld Holdings Limited (OSW) welcomed Ilana Craig Alberico as the Vice President of Business Development & Strategy for Resort Spa Operations. OneSpaWorld, a leading global provider of health and wellness services on cruise ships and at resorts worldwide, made the announcement. The newly created role will leverage Ms. Alberico's expertise in spa development and operations. OneSpaWorld operates across numerous destinations and is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OSW.

data.title: Kroger Q4 Earnings Assessment
data.description: Kroger (NYSE: KR) released its Q4 earnings on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 08:00 AM. The report highlighted that Kroger exceeded expected earnings by 6.67%, achieving an EPS of $1.28 compared to the estimated $1.20. Additionally, revenue saw a significant increase of $417.00 million from the corresponding period of the previous year. For more details on Kroger's past earnings performance, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: These Analysts Cut Their Forecasts On Veeva Systems Following Q4 Results
data.description: Veeva Systems Inc (NYSE: VEEV) saw a significant increase in pre-market trading following the release of their impressive fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $836 million, showing a 16% year-over-year growth, surpassing the estimated $810.6 million. Earnings per share for the quarter were $2.06, exceeding the anticipated $1.93. CEO Peter Gassner expressed optimism about the company's future amidst ongoing transformative initiatives. Veeva Systems provided a strong FY27 guidance, with first-quarter revenue projected between $855 million to $858 million. Analysts had predicted first-quarter revenue to be around $847.2 million. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Insights into BJ's Wholesale Club Hldgs Q4 Earnings
data.description: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, traded on NYSE under BJ, disclosed their Q4 earnings on March 5, 2026, at 06:45 AM. They surpassed anticipated earnings by 3.23% with an EPS of $0.96, higher than the estimated $0.93. Their revenue rose by $296.00 million compared to the previous year. In the last quarter, they exceeded EPS expectations by $0.07, resulting in a 1.13% surge. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: The Buckle, Inc. Reports February 2026 Net Sales and Announces Fourth Quarter Earnings Conference Call
data.description: In Kearney, Nebraska, The Buckle, Inc. released its February 2026 net sales data. The company also disclosed details about its fourth-quarter earnings conference call. The report did not reveal the specific numbers, but it indicates positive financial performance for the given period. This update signifies a healthy trend for The Buckle, Inc. as they navigate the current market dynamics.

data.title: Alpine Income Property Trust Announces $32.0 Million First Mortgage Loan Investment
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida, on March 5, 2026, Alpine Income Property Trust, Inc. disclosed the introduction of a first mortgage loan investment worth $32.0 million (receiving $8.6 million initially). The loan is set for a 24-month duration with a 13.00% interest rate, including 1.5% paid-in-kind interest. This rate will decrease to 11.50% current pay once the borrower fulfills specific requirements. The Company involved is listed as PINE on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Estée Lauder Acquires Remaining Interest In India's Forest Essentials
data.description: Estée Lauder Companies (NYSE: EL) is seeing a boost in its stock during the premarket session following an expansion of its partnership with Forest Essentials, a well-known Indian beauty brand. The Dow Jones was down by 0.12%, while the Nasdaq was up by 0.04% on the previous trading day. The acquisition deal involves Estée Lauder acquiring the remaining interests in Forest Essentials, after an 18-year partnership. The transaction is set to close in the second half of 2026, showcasing Estée Lauder's confidence in Forest Essentials. Estée Lauder had initially made a minority investment in Forest Essentials in 2008, increased to 49% in 2020. Forest Essentials, founded in 2000, specializes in luxury Ayurveda products and is forecasted to achieve low double-digit growth.
